page_content:
### **How to Use This Document**  
1. **Body of the Email:** You can copy and paste these five bullets directly into the body of your emails to **Dr. Jafari**, **Dr. Horn**, and **Dr. Vijay**.  
2. **The "Packet" Attachment:** You can also save these bullets as a one-page PDF titled `Arian_Moridani_Project_Summary.pdf` and attach it alongside your CV.
